name: milo-cost-auditor
postCreateCommand:
pip install -e . && pip install pytest && python -m pytest -q && echo '
✅ Setup complete.

Try the audit in 60 seconds:
  python -c "from milo_cost_auditor import audit_engine; print(audit_engine.audit(open(\"launch/fixtures/milo_real_invoice_sample.csv\").read(), period_days=30))"

Or browse examples/audit_your_own_bill.md.
'
